description_long: This chest of drawers features a dark, rich wood finish with ornate metallic embellishments along the sides and corners, giving it a classic, antique appearance. The front displays four drawers, each adorned with decorative metal handles and round knobs, suggesting a blend of both functionality and elegance. The sides are accented with swirling metallic inlays and elaborate trim, enhancing its luxurious aesthetic. The top is flat and slightly curved at the back, suitable for placing small items or decor. The back is plain, with only minimal metallic corner protectors visible. The overall construction appears sturdy, with a focus on both visual appeal and practical storage.
description: A dark wood chest of drawers with ornate metallic trim, decorative handles, and four spacious drawers, exuding a classic antique style.
description_view_0: Front view showing four drawers with ornate metal handles and knobs, and decorative metallic trim along the sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the swirling metallic inlay and elaborate trim, with the profile of the drawers visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain wooden back with minimal metallic corner protectors and no visible drawers or handles.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with swirling metallic inlay and ornate trim, and the profile of the drawers.
